name: Ovo: Fudgy Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray an 8 x 8 pan with Pam cooking spray.
2. In a medium bowl, sift together the cocoa powder, flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Measure all ingredients before sifting to ensure accuracy.
4. In a large bowl, mix the oil and sugar until well combined.
5. Whisk in the egg whites, applesauce, and vanilla extract.
6. Combine the flour mixture with the egg mixture.
7. Add the walnuts if desired.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
9. Optionally, replace the oil with an equal amount of peanut butter warmed in the microwave with a little Kahlúa added.
These fudgy brownies are incredibly chocolatey and rich, so additional frosting or icing is not necessary. Enjoy!
